name: notify_rules
title: Notify Rules
description: Declared event-pattern -> notification rules (plan/vocabulary/12-notify-spec.md). One row per rule: an event_pattern (<collection>.record.<created|updated|deleted>, * allowed per segment), an optional flat match {field:value} (ANDed; on an update, restricted to CHANGED fields so it fires on the transition), a recipients rule (owner/field/users/role), and channels (v1 delivers in_app: one notifications row per recipient; email waits on 01-email-adapter). Driven by object_notify + the daemon's process_notifications pass polling the record-change log -- no event-handler dependency. admin-owned: a rule can notify anyone, so only admins author them.

fields.name: event_pattern
fields.label: Event Pattern
fields.help: <collection>.record.<created|updated|deleted>; * allowed in the collection or action segment.

fields.name: match
fields.label: Match Conditions (JSON)
fields.help: Flat {field: value}, ANDed on equality. Omit for every record matching the pattern.

fields.name: suppress_self
fields.label: Suppress Self
fields.help: Skip the recipient who is the change's own actor.

fields.name: channels
fields.label: Channels (JSON)
fields.help: [{channel: in_app, body_template}, ...]. v1 delivers in_app only.
